This is the orientation map for the repo. For the human-readable summary + status, see `README.md`. For the machine-readable contract, see `paths-manifest.json`.

## Domains

### `foundations/`

- **`foundations.md`** _[human]_ ‚Äî `foundations/src/foundations.md`
  - Master reference for Actian DS ‚Äî primitives, tokens, scales (Design system lead, MD-as-SoT).
- **`foundations.authoring`** _[human]_ ‚Äî `foundations/src/AUTHORING.md`
  - How to edit foundations.md (UX team guide).
- **`foundations.bundle`** _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist/foundations.bundle.json`
  - Full nested foundations tree (hierarchical Pattern H roll-up).
- **`foundations.index`** _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist/_index.json`
  - Root foundations metadata + top-level child list.
- **`foundations.source`** _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist/foundations.md`
  - Verbatim copy of foundations/src/foundations.md (Stripe .md URL pattern).
- **`foundations.color-primitives`** _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist/color-primitives/_index.json`
  - Hierarchical _index for foundations section 'Color Primitives'.
- **`foundations.tokens`** _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist/tokens/_index.json`
  - Hierarchical _index for foundations section 'Tokens'.
- **`foundations.design-guidelines`** _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist/design-guidelines/_index.json`
  - Hierarchical _index for foundations section 'Design Guidelines'.
- **`foundations.leaf`** _(collection)_ _[ci]_ ‚Äî `foundations/dist`
  - Per-leaf foundations JSONs in hierarchical Pattern H layout.

- **`tokens.json`** _[human]_ ‚Äî `tokens/tokens.json`

## Coverage / debt

See `components/dist/guidelines/coverage.md` ‚Äî the documentation-debt matrix (auto-generated).

## Consumers

- **Actian DS Claude plugin** ‚Äî pins a snapshot of this repo via `vendor-snapshot.yml`; consumes the manifest contract.
- **Docs site** (in development) ‚Äî reads via the same manifest.
- **External / future AI agents** ‚Äî `.md` URL pattern planned for next phase.
